title: Roleplay Slot
description: Allows for the carved pumpkin to be placed in the hat slot and rendered.
body:
Allows for the carved pumpkin to be placed in the hat slot. This is rendered to look similar to the vanilla head slot.

If the 1.21.1 version is used, it functions using CIT Resewn.
If the 1.21.11 version is used, it functions using the `minecraft:item_model` component. A mod or data pack is recommended to be able to take advantage of this.

The carved pumpkin is slightly smaller than a helmet to allow for the helmet to be visible by default. This can be bypassed by using something that hides the armor or by using a scaled up model.
